period-house-haslemere-surrey.quote: ..... we're finding, pretty much daily, we catch ourselves in the space doing something wonderfully mundane like cooking in the kitchen or reading books on the sofa in front of the wood-burner or having a meal round the table, and every time we do, we still can’t quite believe how incredibly lucky we have been and how successful your design is.
candidates: ..... we're finding, pretty much daily, we catch ourselves in the space doing something wonderfully mundane like cooking in the kitchen or reading books on the sofa in front of the wood-burner or having a meal round the table, and every time we do, we still can’t quite believe how incredibly lucky we have been and how successful your design is.

1960s-house-fernhurst-west-sussex.quote: What I find nice about my home is that its very spacious and open, so you can hear each other and don't need to run up or downstairs all the time. You always know your family is around. There are lots of windows so you don't need the lights on all the time and you look out to the garden wherever you are in the house.
candidates: What I find nice about my home is that its very spacious and open, so you can hear each other and don't need to run up or downstairs all the time. You always know your family is around. There are lots of windows so you don't need the lights on all the time and you look out to the garden wherever you are in the house.

1960s-house-haslemere-surrey.quote: We chose ArchitectureLIVE because of their enthusiasm, collective experience and out-and-out creativity. They were highly engaged with our project and always able to find creative solutions within budget.

period-property-hindhead-surrey.quote: They resolved every challenge in a sensible way, applying a great depth of knowledge about how buildings are put together.
candidates: They resolved every challenge in a sensible way, applying a great depth of knowledge about how buildings are put together.

workers-cottage-south-downs-national-par.quote: In contrast to other architects, we found Irene was very positive and generated a number of interesting ideas. We were looking for a design that would contrast with the rest of the house and ArchitectureLIVE achieved this using clever angles that gave us new views of our garden.

secondary-school-newbury-west-berkshire.quote: ArchitectureLIVE have proven to be visionary thinkers matched by down-to-earth practicality and a passion for detail. Their confident and friendly handling of our project meant I never felt out of my depth.
